docket_entries.description: NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED APR-15-2019, SERVED MAR-26-2019 (TRANSACTION ID # 100069417) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. , IN TH EPUBLIC INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MID CITY CANNABIS CLUB, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100070763) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC. , IN TH EPUBLIC INTEREST HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-2019 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS UNDER HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNINGS THAT ARE REQUIRED BY THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTIONS 25249.5-25249.14; THE AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES IS REASONABLE UNDER CALIFORNIA LAW; AND THE PENALTY AMOUNT IS REASONABLE BASED ON THE CRITERIA SET FORTH IN HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(B)(2). ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCED PUBLIC AWARENESS, INC.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment:

Plaintiff Center for Advanced Public Awareness, Inc.'s motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warnings that are required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
